title: Growth Gateway: Investing in green sectors in ASEAN, Cambodia sustainability opportunities
body: "This slide deck was prepared by the Growth Gateway programme team in collaboration with the Boston Consulting Group. It aims to support stakeholders in understanding how Cambodia could unlock over £1.2 billion in GDP and create up to 300,000 jobs by 2030 through targeted green investments in agriculture, energy, and industry, supported by a £61 million pipeline of sustainable projects.  The document analyses the potential effect of mitigation and resilience policy actions on Cambodia’s economy, identifies the main actors, and lists a pipeline of potentially investable projects.   Find out more about Growth Gateway.  "
